items.title: Sixteen injured after ex-student opens fire at high school in Turkey
items.dek: Students and teachers are among those who were injured in the attack in the country's south-east.
items.body: Students and teachers are among those who were injured in the attack in the country's south-east.

items.title: Police officers among seven arrested over deadly Haiti stampede
items.dek: An investigation is under way into what led to the deaths of 25 people at Laferrière Citadel on Saturday.

items.title: What's changed since Harry and Meghan last visited Australia in 2018?
